name: Accordion
description: A collapsible content panel for showing and hiding sections of content.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the panel is expanded. Reflected to attribute for CSS targeting.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Prevents toggling and applies disabled styles to the trigger button.

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: Clickable header that toggles the panel.

events.name: kb-toggle
events.description: Dispatched when open state changes, with `detail.open`.
